name: Prayer
effect: Pick 1: Draw 2 cards OR deal 1 damage (+1 if another player also uses Prayer).

name: Caring
effect: Pick 1: Gain 1 friendship OR Possessed gains 1 HP.

name: Tea for Two
effect: Pick 1: Gain 2 friendship OR Possessed gains 2 HP.

name: Gifts
effect: Discard a card, then Possessed gains 3 HP.

name: Good Old Days
effect: Gain 3 friendship.

name: Lighthouse
effect: During Manifest, absorb 1 demon damage by discarding 1 card.

name: Dealing with the Past
effect: Discard any number of cards, deal 2+damage to a demon.

name: Coffee Break
effect: Gain 5 energy and distribute among players.

name: Call for Help
effect: Take 1 card from Action discard into hand.

name: Healthy Meal
effect: Gain 3 energy.

name: Time Travel
effect: Discard 1 card and reroll dice.

name: Talk It Out!
effect: Roll dice: 1-4 reveal demon, 5-6 lose 1 friendship.

name: Sharp Truth
effect: Spend 2 friendship, deal 3 damage to a demon.

name: Wild Card
effect: Roll dice for draw/discard effect.

name: Fast and Pray
effect: Discard 1 card, deal 5 damage to a demon.

name: Rule Book
effect: Transfer energy, friendship, or cards with another player.

name: Instant Access
effect: Roll dice to search discard or deck.

name: Resurrection
effect: If Possessed has 0 HP, set to 1 HP.

name: Trumpet of Victory
effect: At Manifest start, Possessed gains 1 HP.

name: The Chain is Broken
effect: Roll dice and deal that much damage to a demon.

name: Contract Breaker
effect: Deal damage equal to Possessed current HP.

name: Demon's Contract
effect: Hidden demon contract.

name: Hopelessness
effect: All players max hand size is 4.

name: Jealousy
effect: When Possessed gains HP via Action, that player loses 1 friendship.

name: Rejection
effect: When Possessed loses HP, player with most cards discards 2.

name: Greed
effect: When Possessed gains HP, Greed gains same HP.

name: Rage
effect: When Rage loses HP, double attack until end of cycle.

name: Bitterness
effect: At 10 HP or below, Caring and Gifts have no effect.

name: Addiction
effect: If HP 10 or below during Night, gains 2 HP.

name: Sloth
effect: When players Rest, Sloth attack tripled.

name: Pride
effect: When Possessed HP 5 or below, Pride attack doubled.

name: Depression
effect: Possessed cannot gain HP during Night.

name: Suicidal
effect: When dealing damage, discard last DNC in stack.

name: Anxiety
effect: When Possessed takes damage, max HP decreases by 1.

name: Powerlessness
effect: Hero perk failure (skipped in v1).

name: Selfish Imp
effect: Cannot take damage unless main demon revealed or at 10 HP.

name: Impulsive Imp
effect: When Possessed triggered, deals 1 extra damage.

name: Stubborn Imp
effect: Main demon immune until imp destroyed.

name: Foolish Imp
effect: When attacking, discard top 5 of Action deck.

name: Clumsy Imp
effect: When attacking, each player discards 1.

name: Poop Patrol
effect: Max hand size 4 until end of next cycle.

name: The Throne of Terror
effect: Energy capped at 4 until end of next cycle.

name: The Donut Bandit
effect: Pick 1: drawer loses 2 energy OR all lose 1 friendship.

name: The Haunted Leftover Pizza
effect: Pick 1: Possessed loses 2 HP OR all lose 1 energy.

name: Divine Descent
effect: Demons do not manifest this cycle.

name: Overdramatic Eye Roll
effect: Block 2 demon damage next Manifest.

name: Emergency Cat Video
effect: All players gain 2 energy.

name: Morphin' Time
effect: Roll dice for 1 or 3 demon damage.

name: Pocket-Sized Dragon
effect: Roll dice: energy or friendship for all.

name: Cock-a-Double-DOOM!
effect: Next Draw phase, draw twice.

name: Lost Sock Summoning
effect: Each player draws 1 card.

name: The Backup Unicorn
effect: Pick 1: drawer gains 2 friendship OR all gain 1 energy.

name: The Mighty Rubber Duck
effect: Pick 1: drawer gains 3 energy OR all gain 1 friendship.

name: The Phantom Fart
effect: Roll dice: lose friendship or demons take 2 damage.

name: Oops, Wrong Spell!
effect: Roll dice: Possessed loses 1 HP OR all gain 1 energy.

name: Lost Hours
effect: Roll 1-3: discard current DNC.

name: Sudden-Sadness Imp
effect: Possessed cannot be healed until imp defeated.

name: Self-Doubt Imp
effect: When Possessed takes damage, also triggered.

name: First Aid Kit
effect: Drawer keeps card; absorbs 1 demon damage as instant.

name: Sarah
effect: Caring and Gifts blocked until end of cycle.

name: Emma
effect: Roller discards 2 cards.

name: Sophia
effect: Roller loses 1 friendship.

name: Victoria
effect: All actions cost +1 energy until end of cycle.

name: Zoey
effect: Prayer has no effect on demons until end of cycle.

name: Rosy Boo
effect: Discard top N cards from Action deck.

name: Puddle
effect: If HP below 9, demons gain HP.

name: Jonathan
effect: Roller loses 1 energy.

name: Wilson
effect: Wilson gains 1 HP.

name: Ash
effect: Roller discards cards equal to demon attack.
